problem: An insect has just told me that she has laid $154_6$ eggs. In base 10, how many eggs did she lay?

classified_questions.question: How is the given number, $154_6$, represented in base 6?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Can you convert the given base 6 number, $154_6$, to base 10? If so, how?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: What is the value of the coefficient of $6^2$ in the base 10 representation of $154_6$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the value of the coefficient of $6^1$ in the base 10 representation of $154_6$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the value of the coefficient of $6^0$ in the base 10 representation of $154_6$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can you calculate the sum of the individual terms in the base 10 representation of $154_6$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the final result of converting $154_6$ to base 10, in terms of the number of eggs laid by the insect?
classified_questions.label: b
